description_long: This is a small, humanoid doll with a round yellow head, large black circular eyes, and a wide black smiling mouth. The doll features two prominent, upward-pointing white horns on either side of its head, giving it a playful or mischievous appearance. Its body is covered in a textured, bright red suit that extends to its arms and legs, with no visible fingers or toes. The back of the head is plain yellow, while the top of the head has a gray, swirled patch resembling a tuft of hair. The surface of the doll appears to be made of a soft, fabric-like material, possibly stuffed with a lightweight filling. The overall design is simple and cartoonish, suitable for a child's toy or as a decorative item in an urban park or playground.
description: A small, cartoonish doll with a yellow head, white horns, and a red textured body, featuring a smiling face and a playful design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, black eyes, and both white horns clearly, with the red body fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding horn, and the gray swirled patch on top of the head.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the plain yellow back of the head, both white horns, and the red suit covering the back of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other profile, the second horn, and the gray swirled patch on the head.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a one-piece, bright red suit with a textured, fabric-like appearance, covering the entire body except for the head and horns. The suit is plain with no visible patterns, accessories, or brand markings, evoking a simple, playful style.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs slightly apart. The head is facing forward, and the body posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a smiling facial expression, with a wide, curved black mouth and large, round black eyes. There are no eyebrows or other features indicating emotion beyond the smile.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has a short, gray, swirled patch on the top of its head, resembling a tuft of hair, with the rest of the head being smooth and yellow.
